text:
Created attachment 218461
Patch for patchelf

Update patchelf to 0.12
Use release archive as suggested by section 5.4.3 in Porter's Handbook.

Tested on FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT #0 r364979 (amd64) (make + make check-plist + make test)
Poudriere testport OK 12.1-RELEASE (amd64)
